'''ân-m-r''' ('''shanamar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:namierize|namierize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:namierize|namierize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-m-r
|-
! Lemma
| shanamar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinamar|thinamar]] || [[word:jinamar|jinamar]] || [[word:shinamar|shinamar]] || [[word:kinamar|kinamar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunamar|thuthunamar]] || [[word:jujunamar|jujunamar]] || [[word:shushunamar|shushunamar]] || [[word:kukunamar|kukunamar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunamar|thunamar]] || [[word:junamar|junamar]] || [[word:shunamar|shunamar]] || [[word:kunamar|kunamar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunamar|thunamar]] || [[word:junamar|junamar]] || [[word:shunamar|shunamar]] || [[word:kunamar|kunamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenamar|thenamar]] || [[word:jenamar|jenamar]] || [[word:shenamar|shenamar]] || [[word:kenamar|kenamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonamar|thothonamar]] || [[word:jojonamar|jojonamar]] || [[word:shoshonamar|shoshonamar]] || [[word:kokonamar|kokonamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonamar|thonamar]] || [[word:jonamar|jonamar]] || [[word:shonamar|shonamar]] || [[word:konamar|konamar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonamar|thonamar]] || [[word:jonamar|jonamar]] || [[word:shonamar|shonamar]] || [[word:konamar|konamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnamar|thĂŠnamar]] || [[word:jĂŠnamar|jĂŠnamar]] || [[word:shĂŠnamar|shĂŠnamar]] || [[word:kĂŠnamar|kĂŠnamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanamar|thathanamar]] || [[word:jajanamar|jajanamar]] || [[word:shashanamar|shashanamar]] || [[word:kakanamar|kakanamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanamar|thanamar]] || [[word:janamar|janamar]] || [[word:shanamar|shanamar]] || [[word:kanamar|kanamar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanamar|thanamar]] || [[word:janamar|janamar]] || [[word:shanamar|shanamar]] || [[word:kanamar|kanamar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanamar|shanamar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanamar|goshanamar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanamar|gokishanamar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanamarnĂŒ|shanamarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanamarnknĂŒ|goshanamarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanamarnĂŒ|gokishanamarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanamarshĂ«|shanamarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanamarnkshĂ«|goshanamarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanamarshĂ«|gokishanamarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanamaro|shanamaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanamarnkro|goshanamarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanamaro|gokishanamaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanamarmu|shanamarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanamarnkmu|goshanamarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanamarmu|gokishanamarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanamarsher|shanamarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanamarnksher|goshanamarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanamarsher|gokishanamarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanamarng|shanamarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanamarnkng|goshanamarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanamarng|gokishanamarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanamarya|shanamarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanamarnkya|goshanamarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanamarya|gokishanamarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanamaryam|shanamaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanamarnkyam|goshanamarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanamaryam|gokishanamaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanamarnĂŒshĂ«|shanamarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanamarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanamarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanamarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanamarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanamarnĂŒro|shanamarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanamarnknĂŒro|goshanamarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanamarnĂŒro|gokishanamarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanamarnĂŒmu|shanamarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanamarnknĂŒmu|goshanamarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanamarnĂŒmu|gokishanamarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanamarshĂ«nĂŒ|shanamarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanamarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanamarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanamarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanamarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanamarshĂ«ro|shanamarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanamarnkshĂ«ro|goshanamarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanamarshĂ«ro|gokishanamarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanamarshĂ«mu|shanamarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanamarnkshĂ«mu|goshanamarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanamarshĂ«mu|gokishanamarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanamaronĂŒ|shanamaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanamarnkronĂŒ|goshanamarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanamaronĂŒ|gokishanamaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanamaroshĂ«|shanamaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanamarnkroshĂ«|goshanamarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanamaroshĂ«|gokishanamaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanamaromu|shanamaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanamarnkromu|goshanamarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanamaromu|gokishanamaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanamarmunĂŒ|shanamarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanamarnkmunĂŒ|goshanamarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanamarmunĂŒ|gokishanamarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanamarmushĂ«|shanamarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanamarnkmushĂ«|goshanamarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanamarmushĂ«|gokishanamarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanamarmuro|shanamarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanamarnkmuro|goshanamarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanamarmuro|gokishanamarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a27364f}}
